# Vendored Modelica Libraries

This directory contains Modelica source dependencies used by CI simulation
tests. The tests must not depend on a developer's local Rumoca checkout.

## CMM-v0.0.2

- Source: https://github.com/CogniPilot/modelica_models/releases/download/v0.0.2/CMM_v0.0.2.zip
- SHA-256: `ec233a25a0875d2ba1d07f4199a25c8eeb86694d3f9867394d2ae50e41574508`
- License: Apache-2.0, included in `CMM-v0.0.2/LICENSE`

## Rumoca FixedWingSIL

- Source: https://github.com/CogniPilot/rumoca/blob/main/examples/interactive/fixedwing/FixedWingSIL.mo
- Local copy: `../plant/FixedWingSIL.mo`
